title: SUCCESS: 2026-06-22: Double-checked Screen Sharing settings using AppleScript to verify that Adaptive Quality is checked (✓),...
content: Approach: 2026-06-22: Double-checked Screen Sharing settings using AppleScript to verify that Adaptive Quality is checked (✓), Full Quality is unchecked, and HDR is unchecked. Confirmed that VNC client side is fully optimized.
